# Wicklee
> Fleet intelligence for sovereign AI.
> Monitor GPU health, inference cost, thermal state, and WES scores
> across every node running Ollama or vLLM on your own hardware.
> Built for humans and their agents.

## About
- Wicklee is a sovereign GPU fleet monitor
- Single Rust binary, embeds a React dashboard at localhost:7700
- Cloud console at wicklee.dev for multi-node fleet view
- WES (Wicklee Efficiency Score) = tok/s ÷ (Watts × ThermalPenalty)
- The MPG for local AI inference

## Blog
- /blog — all posts
- /blog/wes-the-mpg-for-local-ai-inference.md — WES introduction

## API (Phase 3B — coming soon)
- GET /api/v1/fleet — fleet summary, all nodes
- GET /api/v1/fleet/wes — WES scores, all nodes, ranked
- GET /api/v1/nodes/{id} — single node metrics
- GET /api/v1/route/best — routing recommendation (latency or efficiency)

## MCP Server (Phase 5 — coming soon)
- wss://wicklee.dev/mcp
- Tools: wicklee_fleet_status, wicklee_best_route,
         wicklee_wes_scores, wicklee_node_metrics

## Metrics Reference
- /metrics — interactive metrics reference page
- /metrics.md — raw Markdown version of the metrics reference (machine-readable)

## Docs
- /docs/install — installation guide
- /docs/wes — WES formula and methodology
- /docs/api — API reference (coming soon)

## Install
curl -fsSL https://wicklee.dev/install.sh | bash
irm https://wicklee.dev/install.ps1 | iex
